name: Burnt Hickory Park
description: Come play pickleball at Burnt Hickory Park in Dallas, GA! There are 4 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. Players have access to lights.

name: Mt. Tabor Park
description: Mt. Tabor Park is a place to play pickleball in Dallas, GA. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.
